title: Senior Teacher - NASSCOM Foundation - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - NASSCOM Foundation - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the NASSCOM Foundation family as a Senior Teacher in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NASSCOM Foundation:
NASSCOM Foundation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NASSCOM Foundation!
